name: Ernie Freeman
abstract: Ernest Aaron Freeman (August 16, 1922 – May 16, 1981) was an American pianist, organist, bandleader, and arranger. He was responsible for arranging many successful rhythm and blues and pop records from the 1950s to the 1970s.

about_quotes.speaker: Leonidas Raymond Young
about_quotes.evidence: Your band at the Oasis, you mentioned, had Ernie Freeman... [INTERVIEWEE] Yeah.

about_quotes.speaker: Plas Johnson
about_quotes.evidence: we played in a jazz trio also for about a year where he played Hammond organ.
about_quotes.doc_title: Plas Johnson interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, Florida, April 12, 1996
